name: Shift-Stick RPG
description:
"The ShiftStick, a wonder in magical engineering. Although it looks like a regular TV remote, through the combination of transformational magic and quantum physics, the ShiftStick allows one to 'shift" their place in reality. Not only can it change your form, but no one but the users of the ShiftStick will notice anything different! If you can ignore its..light kinks... then there's no reason not to get a Shift-Stick. Get yours today!"

Original concept of the Shift-Stick (and the description text) belongs to Kiascaps on Deviantart: https://www.deviantart.com/kiascaps seriously check them out, they are a talented TG writer.
creator: Mason8tor
